title: Remove current SQLite DB driver
body:
The SQLite DB backend has become an unmanageable nightmare. I like having the option for DB work, but it's become an active hindrance to further development, and it's definitely not in any shape to be actively used.

This should also drastically lower our binary size.

I'd like to find the time to rewrite this eventually using an ORM. We'll see if I find the time.
